metadata.description: ScholarAIO — Academic research terminal for Claude Code. Search, read, and analyze papers from your local knowledge base while coding.

plugins.name: scholaraio
plugins.description: Full ScholarAIO skill suite: literature search, layered reading, ingestion, topic modeling, citation graphs, scientific tool docs, workspace management, academic writing, and more. Requires Python 3.10+; auto-installs on first session.
